title: Wild Wild West
description: Some interesting and unique wild west themed guns, Created for a Minecraft server.
body:
A wild west themed gun mod, currently includes 4 fully modled and funtional guns
**Flintlock Pistol**: Shoots out a grenade like projectile that explodes on impact. Shift right clicking preforms a rocket jump.
**6-Shot Revolver**: Shoots out a 6 shot burst that kills most enemies in 2 hits. Meaning with good aim, you can take out 3 enemies in 1 shot.
**Sawed Off Shotgun**: A high damage, low accuracy weapon that shoots out a wide spread of 8 bullets.
**Flare Gun**: Although not as "wild west" the flare gun shoots out... you guessed it, a flare. The flare spawns particles in the air so player can easily find you if you were to shoot it straight up. When an entity is hit with it, the entity will be givin slowness and will be lit on fire for 30-60 seconds.

_The mod is not quite yet finished, It was made for a minecraft server that will be coming out soon as of the time of writing this._
